::: {.section}
::: {.container}

## Latest update

::: {.cardx}
**Documentation refresh and site stabilization**  
The Quarto landing site has been finalized as the primary navigation layer, with pkgdown retained as the authoritative API reference. Decision guides, FAQs, and developer notes are now first-class pages.

[Read the full update](news.html){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

## Where to start (recommended path)

::: {.grid-3}

::: {.cardx}
### New users
If this is your first time here:
1. Read Getting Started  
2. Use the Decision Guide  
3. Follow the first Cookbook workflow

[Getting Started](getting-started.html){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Applied users
If you already know what you want to model:
- Browse Kernels
- Jump straight to Cookbook examples
- Use pkgdown for API details

[Cookbook](cookbook.html){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Developers & contributors
If you want to understand internals or contribute:
- Developers page
- Discussions for design
- Issues for bugs

[Developers](developers.html){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::



::: {.section}
::: {.container}

<hr>

<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1rem;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;font-size:.9rem;color:rgba(0,0,0,.65)">

<div>
© DPmixGPD · Bayesian semiparametric modeling for heavy-tailed data
</div>

<div>
<a href="cite.html">How to cite</a> ·
<a href="pkgdown/index.html">API reference</a> ·
<a href="https://github.com/arnabaich96/DPmixGPD">GitHub</a>
</div>

</div>

:::
:::
